name: Ogura Clutch Co.,Ltd.
summary: Ogura Clutch Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells various clutch brakes and parts for office automation equipment and automotive race cars worldwide. The company offers clutch brakes for general industry, such as office machines, machine tools, construction machines, and industrial machines; and fiber tensioners, automotive air conditioner clutches, superchargers, power clutches, oil mist separators, coolant systems, disaster prevention systems, etc. It also provides OA micro clutches, racing clutches, tension control and precision manufacturing systems, and industrial machine parts. The company was formerly known as Ogura Seisakusho Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Ogura Clutch Co.,Ltd. in May 1961. Ogura Clutch Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1938 and is headquartered in Kiryu, Japan.
